actionUnits.condition: Object has a BoxCollider (m_IsTrigger=0) and no Rigidbody; it attaches MonoBehaviour (guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) that corresponds to Fire.cs. To test the manual interaction path, we must cause the water system to invoke IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(Vector3) repeatedly within maxHitInterval (2s) for at least totalHitTime (5s). Expected: Fire enters isTurningOff state on first hit, currentHitInterval resets on each hit, currentHitTime accumulates; once currentHitTime >= totalHitTime without exceeding maxHitInterval between hits, fire turns off (isOn=false), UpdateFireState(true) stops mainEffectGo ParticleSystem and notifies neighbors + FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1). Note: No public parameterless methods are exposed, so this Trigger represents sustained water contact rather than a direct method call.
